mapper.insert: insert into dish_review(user_id, order_id, dish_id, rating, content, images, like_count, status, ai_generated, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images}, #{likeCount}, #{status}, #{aiGenerated}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select r.id, r.order_id as orderId, r.dish_id as dishId, r.user_id as userId, u.name as userName, r.rating, r.content, r.images as imagesJson, r.like_count as likeCount, case when l.id is null then false else true end as liked, r.create_time as createTime from dish_review r left join user u on u.id = r.user_id left join dish_review_like l on l.review_id = r.id and l.user_id = #{currentUserId} where r.dish_id = #{dishId} and r.status = 1 order by r.create_time desc, r.id desc
select * from dish_review where order_id = #{orderId} and dish_id = #{dishId} and user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from dish_review where order_id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update dish_review set like_count = greatest(ifnull(like_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
